title: Cheap Houses for Rent in Detroit-Shoreway, Cleveland
metaTitle: Cheap Houses for Rent in Detroit-Shoreway Cleveland
metaDescription: Cheap houses for rent in Detroit-Shoreway, Cleveland (44102) near Gordon Square. See rent ranges, transit info, and voucher-friendly homes. Book a showing.
primaryKeyword: cheap houses for rent Detroit-Shoreway cleveland
answerBox: Detroit-Shoreway (ZIP 44102) is a near-west-side Cleveland neighborhood near the Gordon Square Arts District. Affordable 1- and 2-bedroom houses in the area generally start in the $700s to $900s a month, and we manage a number of voucher-friendly rental homes in and around the neighborhood.

body: Detroit-Shoreway sits in **ZIP code 44102** on Cleveland's near-west side, between Ohio City and the Lake Erie shore. Much of its housing dates from the early 1900s: modest wood-frame single-family houses and two-family duplexes, many with small front yards and full basements — older housing stock that tends to rent below newer, larger apartment developments elsewhere in the city.

We manage a number of voucher-friendly rental homes in and around Detroit-Shoreway, and pricing on the smaller end of our portfolio (1- and 2-bedroom homes) is generally the most affordable option in this part of the city. [Book a free showing](/p/book-showing) to see current listings and pricing.

sections.h2: What does a cheap house cost in this ZIP code?
body: Across our managed portfolio, the most affordable currently-available homes in Cleveland run from about $700 for a 1-bedroom up to roughly $1,100 for a 2-bedroom, based on our current listings data. For citywide context, Zumper's rent report dated July 4, 2026 lists Cleveland's median rent at $1,060 for studios and $1,100 for 2-bedrooms — figures that line up closely with the lower end of our own portfolio and give a realistic sense of what "cheap" means in this market.

Detroit Avenue is the neighborhood's commercial spine, running past the Gordon Square Arts District's theaters, restaurants, and shops. RTA bus routes run the length of Detroit Avenue and Lorain Avenue, connecting to Downtown and to the Red Line at the Ohio City station just to the east. Edgewater Park, part of the Cleveland Metroparks Lakefront system, is a short distance to the north along the lake.

items: **Housing stock:** Early-1900s single-family homes and duplexes
**Transit:** RTA bus routes on Detroit and Lorain Avenues; near the Ohio City Red Line station

body: Every rental home we manage in and around Detroit-Shoreway accepts Housing Choice Vouchers (Section 8) and is HUD-inspection-ready — a useful fact for voucher holders trying to find an affordable house in this ZIP code. Keep in mind that Ohio has no statewide source-of-income protection law and Cleveland has not enacted a citywide voucher-protection ordinance, so acceptance policies vary outside of the homes we manage. See our [Cleveland Section 8 guide](/section-8-housing-cleveland-oh/) for the local program details.

For renters using a Housing Choice Voucher, the Cuyahoga Metropolitan Housing Authority (CMHA) sets an income limit and a payment standard that determines how much of the rent the voucher covers; check the current figures directly on CMHA's site before budgeting for a specific unit. Because a lower asking rent generally means a smaller gap between the payment standard and the unit's rent, the smaller homes common in Detroit-Shoreway can be a practical starting point for a voucher search.

sections.h2: What to expect on a budget in this neighborhood
body: Affordable houses in Detroit-Shoreway are typically older construction, so it's worth asking about the age of major systems (roof, furnace, water heater) and whether utilities are included in the quoted rent, since older homes vary widely in efficiency. Basements are common and often provide extra storage or laundry hookups even in smaller units. Because the neighborhood mixes single-family houses with duplexes, a "cheap house" search here often turns up a full-floor duplex unit at a similar price point to a smaller stand-alone house — worth comparing both when weighing space against monthly cost.

The most reliable way to find an affordable house in Detroit-Shoreway is to check current availability directly, since our lower-cost listings turn over quickly. [Book a free showing](/p/book-showing) with our team, or compare this neighborhood against others on our [Detroit-Shoreway rentals overview](/cleveland-rentals/neighborhoods/houses-for-rent-detroit-shoreway-cleveland/) and our broader [houses for rent in Cleveland](/houses-for-rent-cleveland-oh/) page.

faq.q: What's the cheapest house I can rent in Detroit-Shoreway?
faq.a: Our most affordable currently-available Cleveland homes start around $700 a month for a 1-bedroom, with 2-bedroom homes commonly in the $750–$1,100 range. Availability in the 44102 ZIP code changes regularly, so book a free showing to see current pricing for Detroit-Shoreway specifically.

faq.q: Does Rent Finder Cleveland manage homes in Detroit-Shoreway?
faq.a: Yes. We manage voucher-friendly rental homes in and around Detroit-Shoreway (ZIP 44102), including smaller, more affordable units. Inventory changes regularly, so the best way to see what's currently available is to book a showing with our team.

faq.q: What ZIP code is Detroit-Shoreway in, and what's nearby?
faq.a: Detroit-Shoreway is in ZIP code 44102, shared with the neighboring Cudell area. It's home to the Gordon Square Arts District along Detroit Avenue and sits close to Edgewater Park on the Lake Erie shoreline.

Every home we manage in and around Detroit-Shoreway accepts Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready. Ohio has no statewide law requiring landlords to accept vouchers, so acceptance can vary for homes outside our own managed portfolio.

faq.q: How do I get around Detroit-Shoreway without a car?
faq.a: RTA bus routes run along Detroit Avenue and Lorain Avenue, connecting the neighborhood to Downtown and to the Red Line's Ohio City station nearby. Detroit Avenue also runs directly through the Gordon Square Arts District's shops and restaurants.
